chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI HCA No. 106 of 2022 AND HCA No. 121 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For orders on office objection & reply at ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of CMA No. 802/2022. 11.03.2024 Mr. Muhammad Arif, Advocate for appellant. Mr. Muhammad Ajmal, Advocate for respondent. >>>>> <<<<< Today a statement is filed duly signed by the counsel representing the appellant and respondent No. 1. They submit that they have reached a settlement outside the court and in consequence whereof unless this appeal is allowed by way of setting aside the judgment and decree the purpose would not be served. Accordingly as agreed this appeal is allowed the judgment and decree are set aside leaving the legal heirs of respondent No. 1 to withdraw the suit as agreed amicably between them. As a consequence, of this order the connected HCA No. 121 of 2022 is also become infructuous. This understanding is reached, subject to condition that pending suit (in view of above order in para-1), shall be withdrawn by the legal heirs of respondent No. 1. JUDGE JUDGE Amir PS
